p.strong: Memory Layout Spec v1.0 | Cache Line Alignment (64B)
p.em: Same 8 bytes (Offset 0x08), two interpretations depending on block state.

ul.li: The block at the head of the free_list is selected.
Constraint: Minimum block size must accommodate sizeof(Node).
Write current free_list_head into the user's memory: *(void**)user_ptr = free_list_head.
Update list head to reclaim block: free_list_head = user_ptr.

div.p: The memory at base + 0x08 is interpreted as a Node* for the allocator's internal bookkeeping.
The memory at base + 0x08 is handed to the user. The next pointer is overwritten by user data.
